root_text.an10.124:1.1: “Dasayime, bhikkhave, dhammā anuppannā uppajjanti, nāññatra sugatavinayā.
root_text.an10.124:1.4: ime kho, bhikkhave, dasa dhammā anuppannā uppajjanti, nāññatra sugatavinayā”ti.

translation_text.an10.124:1.1: “Mendicants, these ten things don’t arise apart from the Holy One’s training.
translation_text.an10.124:1.3: Right view, right thought, right speech, right action, right livelihood, right effort, right mindfulness, right immersion, right knowledge, and right freedom.
translation_text.an10.124:1.4: These are the ten things that don’t arise apart from the Holy One’s training.”
